staticText: Route users to the browser-local Wallet Address Format and Checksum Validator without requesting, prefilling, repeating or transmitting any wallet address. The user must explicitly select Bitcoin, Ethereum or EVM, Solana, or TRON and enter only a public receiving address in the tool. The route performs no balance, activity, ownership, recipient identity, sanctions, blacklist, scam-report, contract, token or transaction lookup. Never ask for or echo a private key, seed phrase, password or one-time code, and never describe a format-valid result as safe, active, owned, verified or suitable for a transfer.
